hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
cd /var/www/html/eol_php8_code/update_resources/connectors
### JUST A UTILITY. This one you'll need to edit the PHP file and enter wich taxon file you want to process. #php gen_higherClass.php
#OK 1: This will add higherClassification in taxon.tab and rebuild the DwCA. With carry-over of other extensions. # source is: Brazilian_Flora.tar.gz # generates FILENAME-with-hC.tar.gz php dwca_utility.php _ '{"resource_id": "Brazilian_Flora", "task": "gen_hC_using_pID"}' #using parentNameUsageID
#OK 2: This use gnparser one name at a time. Not entire file. php run_gnparser_dwca.php _ '{"resource_id": "Brazilian_Flora-with-hC"}' #OK gen neo4j_1
#OK 3: Start matching taxa # obsolete php match_taxa_2DH.php _ '{"resource_id": "Brazilian_Flora-with-hC_neo4j_1"}' #OK gen +_eolID # OBSOLETE php match_taxa_2DH.php _ '{"resource_id": "Brazilian_Flora-with-hC_neo4j_1", "AncestryIndexVer": "old"}' #OK gen +_eolID OBSOLETE php match_taxa_2DH.php _ '{"resource_id": "Brazilian_Flora-with-hC_neo4j_1", "AncestryIndexVer": "new"}' #OK gen +_eolID
#OK 4: Convert taxon.tab, use EOLid value for taxonID. # REMINDER: Multiple scinames with different taxonIDs have the same canonical thus will have the same EOLid php use_EOLid_as_taxonID.php _ '{"resource_id": "Brazilian_Flora-with-hC_neo4j_1_eolID"}' # gen Brazilian_Flora_finale
php analyze_MoF.php _ '{"resource_id": "Brazilian_Flora_finale"}'
# rename cd /var/www/html/eol_php8_code/applications/content_server/resources_3 cp Brazilian_Flora_finale.tar.gz Brazilian_Flora_TraitBank_1_0.tar.gz ls -lt Brazilian_Flora_finale.tar.gz ls -lt Brazilian_Flora_TraitBank_1_0.tar.gz rm -f Brazilian_Flora_finale.tar.gz
#build others: [002_TreatmentBank_OK]
